description_long: This hamburger features a thick, golden-brown sesame seed bun on top, generously sprinkled with white sesame seeds. Beneath the top bun, there are visible layers of crisp green lettuce, vibrant purple onion rings, and slices of bright red tomato. Two thick, grilled beef patties are stacked with melted orange cheddar cheese slices between them, creating a hearty and appetizing appearance. The bottom bun is slightly smaller and also golden-brown, supporting the stacked ingredients above. The toppings are arranged in a visually appealing, slightly uneven manner, giving the burger a fresh, hand-assembled look. The overall structure is tall and robust, with each ingredient clearly distinguishable and vibrant in color.
description: A tall hamburger with a sesame seed bun, stacked with lettuce, onion, tomato, two beef patties, and cheddar cheese slices.
description_view_0: The hamburger is shown with the top bun, lettuce, onion, and two cheese-covered patties clearly visible, with the layers slightly offset.
description_view_1: This view highlights the onion and lettuce layers, with the patties and cheese more centered and the tomato less visible.
description_view_2: The tomato slice is more prominent here, along with the onion, lettuce, and cheese, giving a balanced view of all toppings.
description_view_3: The onion and tomato are most visible in this view, with the cheese and patties peeking out beneath the lettuce.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce, onion, and tomato are layered above two cheese-covered beef patties, with the toppings distributed unevenly for a fresh, stacked appearance.
